name: Roast Lamb with Potatoes (Arni Psito Me Patates)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the leg of lamb.
2. Slice the lamb several times on both sides with a sharp knife.
3. Insert thinly sliced garlic into the slits in the lamb.
4. Season with salt and pepper, then brush with melted butter.
5. Squeeze lemon juice over the lamb.
6. Place the lamb in a roasting pan, fat side up.
7. Roast at 450°F for 30 minutes.
8. While the lamb is browning, sprinkle the peeled potatoes with salt.
9. Rub each potato with tomato paste and let stand for a few minutes.
10. Add the potatoes to the baking pan along with hot water.
11. Lower the oven temperature to 350°F.
12. Turn and baste the potatoes occasionally during roasting.
13. When the lamb is done, transfer it to a warm serving platter.
14. Increase the oven temperature to 425°F and brown the potatoes for an additional 20 minutes.
